user_input: supplier ko due date tomorrow, 3500 tirnu cha bank bata
normalized_meaning: Supplier payment of Rs 3500 due tomorrow, need to pay from bank
tax_effect: None on payment.
clarification_question: Supplier ko naam ke ho? Kun invoice/bill ko payment ho?
erp_action: Schedule Payment: Debit Supplier Payable NPR 3500, Credit Bank A/c NPR 3500 (execute tomorrow). Set ERP payment reminder.

user_input: aaj milk price drop garyam — buffalo milk 90 bata 85 garim
normalized_meaning: Dropped buffalo milk selling price from Rs 90 to Rs 85 today
tax_effect: None
erp_action: Update Item Master: Buffalo Milk selling price = NPR 85/litre effective today. Review margin.

user_input: आज दुग्ध सहकारीबाट ५० लिटर गाईको दूध ल्याइयो, रू ५५ प्रति लिटर, सहकारीमा पछि तिर्ने
normalized_meaning: Brought 50 litres cow milk from dairy cooperative at Rs 55/litre, will pay cooperative later
tax_effect: Cooperative may not be VAT registered. Verify. Fresh milk generally VAT exempt.
clarification_question: Cooperative ko naam ke ho? Kati din ma tirnu parcha?
erp_action: Create Credit Purchase Entry: Debit Purchase-Cow Milk NPR 2750, Credit Dairy Cooperative Payable NPR 2750. Update inventory +50L.

user_input: aaj bikrimai ghanata lagyo, machine bichkiyo
normalized_meaning: Today sales slowed down because the machine (possibly sealing machine) broke down
inventory_effect: No direct inventory change. Operational disruption may cause perishables to not be packaged/sold.
tax_effect: None immediately
clarification_question: Kun machine bhichiyo? Repair garyo ki garna baki cha? Repair cost kati lagchha? Spares kinaryo?
erp_action: Log operational note. If repair done: create Repairs Expense entry. If machine written off: create Fixed Asset write-off entry.

user_input: dahi ra milk ko combined invoice banau, hotel Sunrise ko lagi
normalized_meaning: Create a combined invoice for Hotel Sunrise covering dahi and milk supply
inventory_effect: Decrease: Milk and dahi stock as per invoice quantities
tax_effect: Hotel Sunrise may need VAT invoice if they are VAT registered. Check your shop's VAT status.
amount: to be calculated from quantities and rates
clarification_question: Kati litre milk ra kati kg dahi? Rate ke cha? Invoice date ke rakhne? VAT bill banaune ki non-VAT?
erp_action: After item/rate details: Generate Invoice for Hotel Sunrise. Debit Hotel Sunrise Receivable, Credit Sales-Milk + Sales-Dahi. Record in Sales Register.

user_input: staff ko food kharcha diye Rs 500, din bhari kaam gareko
normalized_meaning: Gave Rs 500 for staff food expense, worked all day
tax_effect: Staff welfare expense generally deductible if business related. Consult CA.
erp_action: Create Expense Entry: Debit Staff Welfare/Food Expense NPR 500, Credit Cash NPR 500.

user_input: cold room install garyo, 85000 lako, bank loan bata
normalized_meaning: Installed cold room for Rs 85,000, financed through bank loan
tax_effect: Capital expenditure — depreciation applicable. Not direct expense. Consult CA on depreciation rate under Nepal Income Tax Act.
clarification_question: Contractor ko naam ra invoice cha? Kun bank loan bata gayo? VAT bill aayo? Fixed asset register ma add garnu parcha.
erp_action: Create Fixed Asset Entry: Debit Cold Room A/c NPR 85,000, Credit Bank Loan Payable NPR 85,000. Add to Fixed Asset Register. Set depreciation schedule per Income Tax Act Nepal.

user_input: customer Ram ko khata ma Rs 200 galatii girayo, sahi 150 cha
normalized_meaning: Incorrectly entered Rs 200 in Ram's credit book, correct amount is Rs 150
tax_effect: None
erp_action: Rectify: Reduce Ram's debtor ledger by NPR 50 (either reverse Rs 200 entry and re-enter Rs 150, or create NPR 50 credit adjustment). Document reason for correction.

user_input: lassi banako milk waste bhayo bhane kati cost laagchha?
normalized_meaning: If milk used for making lassi is wasted, what is the cost impact?
tax_effect: None
clarification_question: Ek litre lassi banako kati litre milk lagcha? Milk ko cost kati cha? Lassi waste bhako quantity kati cha?
erp_action: Calculate: Waste cost = litres of milk wasted x purchase cost per litre. Display cost analysis. No journal entry until actual waste occurs.

user_input: income bata ghar rent tiraune, shop cash bata nai diye
normalized_meaning: Paid house rent from shop cash (personal expense from business cash)
tax_effect: Personal expense not business deductible. Drawings = reduction in owner's equity.
clarification_question: Kati rupees diye? Clearly business expense haina — owner ko personal use ko lagi business cash gayo = drawings entry garnu parcha.
erp_action: Create Drawings Entry: Debit Owner Drawings A/c (amount), Credit Cash A/c. Remind owner: mixing personal and business funds is poor practice.

user_input: Puja festival sale: 3 kg ghee, 5 kg khoa, total received Rs 6500 cash
normalized_meaning: Festival (Puja) sale: sold 3 kg ghee and 5 kg khoa, collected Rs 6500 cash
tax_effect: VAT on ghee/khoa to verify. High festival season sales — may need VAT invoice if requested.
clarification_question: Ghee ra khoa ko alag alag price ke cha for ERP item-wise entry? Rs 6500 kaise split garnu?
erp_action: After rate split: Create Sales Entry with two lines: Ghee (3kg x rate) + Khoa (5kg x rate) = NPR 6500. Debit Cash NPR 6500, Credit Sales-Ghee + Sales-Khoa respectively.

user_input: फोनपे बाट पेमेन्ट आयो, रू ३२०
normalized_meaning: Payment received via FonePay, Rs 320
tax_effect: Depends on items.
clarification_question: K k bechyo Rs 320 ma? Customer ko naam ke ho? FonePay transaction ID note gare?
erp_action: After item confirmation: Create Sale Entry. Debit FonePay A/c NPR 320, Credit Sales A/c NPR 320. Record transaction reference.

user_input: purono refrigerator bechio, second hand dealer lai 5000 ma
normalized_meaning: Sold old refrigerator to second-hand dealer for Rs 5000
debit_accounts: Loss on Disposal (if NBV > sale price)
tax_effect: Gain on sale of asset may be taxable. Capital gain treatment under Income Tax Act Nepal. Consult CA.
clarification_question: Original purchase price kati tha? Kati year use garyo? Net book value kati cha? Cash paayo ki baaki cha?
erp_action: Calculate: NBV = Original Cost - Accumulated Depreciation. If NBV > 5000: Loss on disposal. If NBV < 5000: Gain. Create asset disposal entry. Remove from fixed asset register.

user_input: aaj 100 litre milk sales garyam total, cash 70 litre ko, udhar 30 litre ko
normalized_meaning: Total 100 litres milk sold today — 70 litres cash, 30 litres on credit
tax_effect: VAT if applicable.
clarification_question: Per litre rate kati tha? Udhar 30 litre kasle liyo? Naam note gareko cha khata ma?
erp_action: After rate: Debit Cash (70L x rate) + Debit Receivable (30L x rate), Credit Sales NPR (100L x rate). Update inventory -100L. Record credit customers in khata.

user_input: supplier le tyo milk basi thiyo bhani claim garyo, discredit garo
normalized_meaning: Supplier claimed milk was stale/old and denied responsibility (disputed quality)
tax_effect: Depends on resolution outcome
clarification_question: Kati litre ko dispute cha? Supplier le kati amount claim garo? Solution ke bhayo — refund, replacement, ki court?
erp_action: Log dispute note. No entry until resolved. On resolution: create appropriate credit note / debit note / cash entry.

user_input: insurance premium tiryo, shop ko lagi, 6000 per year
normalized_meaning: Paid annual insurance premium for shop Rs 6000
debit_accounts: Insurance Expense (or Prepaid Insurance if advance)
tax_effect: Insurance premium deductible as business expense. Confirm with CA.
clarification_question: Kun insurance company? Policy number ke cha? Cash diye ki bank? Yearly premium ho, monthly split garnu ki ek palta entry garnu?
erp_action: Option A (simple): Debit Insurance Expense NPR 6000, Credit Cash/Bank NPR 6000. Option B (prepaid): Debit Prepaid Insurance NPR 6000, Credit Cash/Bank, then amortize monthly NPR 500.

user_input: daily average sale kati cha mero shop ko?
normalized_meaning: What is my shop's average daily sales?
tax_effect: None
erp_action: Calculate Average Daily Sales from ERP: Total Sales for period / Number of days. Display trend by week/month. Show top-selling items.

user_input: 15 din ko credit diyako tha customer lai, aaj 20 din bhayo, tirena
normalized_meaning: Had given 15-day credit to customer, 20 days have passed without payment
tax_effect: Consider bad debt provision if not recoverable.
clarification_question: Customer ko naam ke ho? Kati amount outstanding cha? Phone contact garne?
erp_action: Fetch customer's overdue invoice from Receivables. Generate overdue notice. Flag account. Consider calling customer for follow-up. Provision for bad debt if recovery uncertain.

user_input: Ramesh le 3 kg ghee lini gayo, 700 per kg, half cash half esewa
normalized_meaning: Ramesh took 3 kg ghee at Rs 700/kg; paid half in cash and half via eSewa
tax_effect: Ghee VAT to verify.
erp_action: Create Sale Entry: Debit Cash NPR 1050 + eSewa NPR 1050, Credit Sales-Ghee NPR 2100. Update inventory -3kg ghee. Note eSewa ref.

user_input: aaj ek din ko lagi temp worker rakho, Rs 700 diye
normalized_meaning: Hired temporary worker for one day, paid Rs 700
tax_effect: Short-term casual labour payment — TDS may apply if payment above threshold per Income Tax Act Nepal. Small daily payment likely below threshold but verify.
erp_action: Create Wages Expense Entry: Debit Casual Labour/Wages NPR 700, Credit Cash NPR 700.

user_input: milk bechyo tara customer le note diyera gayo, fake note lagcha
normalized_meaning: Sold milk but customer paid with what seems to be a fake currency note
credit_accounts: Cash Account (reduce by fake note amount)
tax_effect: Loss on counterfeit — deductible if documented. Consult CA.
clarification_question: Kati rupees ko note tha? Nepal Rastra Bank ma verify gareko cha? Police report diye? Note seize garne ki NRB ma bujhaaune?
erp_action: Create Loss Entry: Debit Counterfeit Loss A/c (denomination amount), Credit Cash A/c. Retain fake note as evidence. Report to Nepal Rastra Bank or police. Document.

user_input: credit card machine lina manlaagyo, EMI available cha?
normalized_meaning: Thinking of getting a credit card (POS) machine, asking if EMI available
tax_effect: POS machine = fixed asset if purchased. Depreciation applicable.
erp_action: No journal entry. Advisory: Contact banks (NMB, NIC Asia, Nabil, Machhapuchchhre, etc.) or eSewa/Khalti/FonePay for POS terminal. Monthly MDR charges applicable on transactions. If purchased: add to Fixed Asset Register.

user_input: sabai jamma paisa kaichhhau — cash 5000, bank 12000, esewa 800, khalti 600, total 18400
normalized_meaning: Summarising all funds: cash Rs 5000, bank Rs 12000, eSewa Rs 800, Khalti Rs 600, total Rs 18,400
tax_effect: None
erp_action: Display Fund Summary: Cash NPR 5000 + Bank NPR 12000 + eSewa NPR 800 + Khalti NPR 600 = Total NPR 18,400. Reconcile each account with respective statements.

user_input: aaj debit card bata kinyo ek customer le, 350 ko dahi
normalized_meaning: A customer paid by debit card for Rs 350 worth of dahi
tax_effect: Verify VAT on dahi.
clarification_question: Kati kg dahi bechyo? POS terminal reference number note gare?
erp_action: Create Sale Entry: Debit Bank/POS Settlement NPR 350, Credit Sales-Dahi NPR 350. Record POS reference. Deduct MDR fee on settlement.

user_input: bank statement aayo, bank balance mismatch cha, 500 rupees farak cha
normalized_meaning: Bank statement received, bank balance doesn't match books by Rs 500
tax_effect: If bank charge unrecorded: Debit Bank Charge Expense, Credit Bank.
clarification_question: Bank statement ra book balance compare garnu. Farak kasari aaayo — bank charge kata-yeko cha? Uncleated cheque cha? Koi deposit miss bhako cha?
erp_action: Perform Bank Reconciliation: Compare ERP Bank A/c balance with bank statement. Identify: (1) Bank charges not recorded, (2) Uncleared cheques, (3) Deposits in transit. Pass adjustment entries for unrecorded items.

user_input: sabai maal ek palta check garna paros, expiry date herna
normalized_meaning: Need to do a complete stock check including expiry date inspection
inventory_effect: After audit: write off expired items
tax_effect: Write-off entries for expired items
erp_action: Generate Stock Expiry Report: List all items with expiry dates. Flag expired or near-expiry (within 3 days). After physical verification: create Write-off entries for expired stock.

user_input: Gita ko khata ma 850 cha, phone garyo, tirchhu bhanchhha
normalized_meaning: Gita has Rs 850 outstanding in khata, she called and said she will pay
tax_effect: None
clarification_question: Kati din ma tirnchha Gita? eSewa/cash ma aaucha? Promise note rakhe ERP ma.
erp_action: Log collection promise in ERP: Gita, NPR 850, commitment date (set reminder). On actual payment: Create Collection Entry.

user_input: 20 lakh ko annual sales lagchha, VAT register garnu parcha?
normalized_meaning: Annual sales estimated around Rs 20 lakh, asking if VAT registration is mandatory
tax_effect: VAT registration threshold is set by Finance Act Nepal (currently NPR 50 lakh annual turnover for goods dealers — VERIFY with current Finance Act and IRD Nepal as threshold may change). At NPR 20 lakh, may not be mandatory but voluntary registration is possible.
erp_action: Advisory: Verify current VAT threshold from IRD Nepal website (www.ird.gov.np) or consult CA. If below threshold, VAT registration optional. If above: mandatory. Note: Threshold and sector-specific rules change per Finance Act annually.

user_input: TDS kataunu parcha ki? milk purchase ma?
normalized_meaning: Do I need to deduct TDS on milk purchase?
tax_effect: TDS on goods purchase from resident individuals/entities: Generally, TDS is applicable on certain payments (rent, professional services, contracts) but not on all goods purchases. Fresh agricultural produce (including milk from farmers) may be specifically exempt or have different TDS rates. Verify with CA and current Nepal Income Tax Act.
erp_action: Advisory: Consult CA or ICAN-registered tax practitioner for TDS obligations specific to your dairy shop purchases (farmer vs corporate supplier). Rules vary — do not rely solely on this system for tax compliance.

user_input: mero opening balance Rs 25000 cha cash ma, aaj naya business suru garo
normalized_meaning: Opening cash balance is Rs 25000, starting new business today
tax_effect: Opening balance entry — no tax effect on this entry.
clarification_question: Aaru koi opening stock, bank balance, ya existing liabilities cha? Business name ke ho? PAN number liyeko cha?
erp_action: Create Opening Balance Entry: Debit Cash NPR 25,000, Credit Owner's Capital NPR 25,000. Enter business name, PAN, and fiscal year start date. Add any other opening balances (stock, bank, etc.).

user_input: stock uthaauna gayo, lorry ma aayo, lorry wala lai 500 tipps diye
normalized_meaning: Went to pick up stock, it arrived by truck, gave Rs 500 tip to truck driver
inventory_effect: None — transportation cost (can be included in purchase cost)
tax_effect: Informal tip payment — no receipt/invoice. Cannot claim as formal business expense without documentation. Small amount — may be recorded as miscellaneous expense.
erp_action: Create Expense Entry: Debit Transport/Misc Expense NPR 500, Credit Cash NPR 500. Note: no receipt for this payment.

user_input: aaj full day maa kati rupees jamma aako — sabai modes bata?
normalized_meaning: How much total money collected today across all payment modes?
tax_effect: None
erp_action: Generate Today's Collection Report: Cash + eSewa + Khalti + FonePay + Bank Transfer + Card = Total Collections. Breakdown by payment mode and by product category.

user_input: 1 kg ghee ko cost 580, bechu 700, profit margin kati percent?
normalized_meaning: Cost of 1 kg ghee is Rs 580, selling at Rs 700, what is the profit margin?
tax_effect: None for calculation. VAT if applicable changes net revenue.
amount: Gross profit = NPR 120 per kg. Gross margin = (120/700) x 100 = 17.14%
erp_action: Calculate: Gross Profit = 700 - 580 = NPR 120. Gross Profit Margin = (120/700) x 100 = 17.14%. Display margin analysis.

user_input: aaja customer le baaph aayo 3 kg dahi 50 discount diye, 225 liye
normalized_meaning: Customer came today, bought 3 kg dahi with Rs 50 discount, paid Rs 225
tax_effect: VAT on net discounted price if applicable. Dahi VAT exempt likely.
erp_action: Create Sale Entry: Debit Cash NPR 225 + Debit Discount Allowed NPR 50, Credit Sales-Dahi NPR 275. Update inventory -3kg.

user_input: milk supplier aagaman garo, quality check gare, tanda cha bhanyo — tara payment advance dinu parcha
normalized_meaning: Milk supplier visited, quality checked — good. But need to pay advance before delivery
tax_effect: No tax at advance stage.
clarification_question: Kati advance dine ho? Supplier ko naam ke ho? Delivery kaha dinchhha? Cash ki bank bata dine?
erp_action: After amount: Create Advance Entry: Debit Advance to Supplier, Credit Cash/Bank. Adjust against purchase invoice when delivery made.

user_input: monthly revenue report dekhaunu cha — item wise
normalized_meaning: Want to see monthly revenue report broken down by item
tax_effect: None
clarification_question: Kun mahina ko report chahiyo?
erp_action: Generate Item-wise Monthly Sales Report: For specified month — Revenue by Milk, Dahi, Ghee, Paneer, Lassi, Khoa, Butter, Cheese, Other. Show quantity sold and value.

user_input: आज बिहान ५ बजे दूध आयो किसानबाट, ८ लिटर, नगद ४०० तिरियो
normalized_meaning: Milk arrived from farmer at 5am today, 8 litres, paid Rs 400 cash
tax_effect: Direct farmer purchase — informal. No VAT invoice expected. Record in daily milk register.
clarification_question: Farmer ko naam note garne ho? Daily register ma record garnu parcha.
erp_action: Create Purchase Entry: Debit Purchase-Milk NPR 400, Credit Cash NPR 400. Update milk inventory +8L. Record time of delivery in daily register.

user_input: I want to give 5% commission to a referral, is it okay?
normalized_meaning: Asking about giving 5% commission to a referral person (possible marketing expense)
tax_effect: Commission paid to individual: TDS @ 15% applicable under Income Tax Act Nepal if payment exceeds threshold. Commission to business entity: different TDS rate. Consult CA.
erp_action: Advisory: Commission expense is allowable business expense. TDS deduction required on commission paid. Create Referral Commission Expense A/c. On payment: Debit Commission Expense, Credit TDS Payable + Cash/Bank. Consult CA for correct TDS rate.

user_input: ful ditta milk le pani churiyo, 10 litre damage
normalized_meaning: Power cut (load shedding) caused milk to spoil, 10 litres damaged
transaction_category: Inventory Loss - Power Cut / Load Shedding
tax_effect: Loss deductible if documented. Insurance claim if covered.
clarification_question: Milk ko cost kati tha per litre? Insurance cha shop ko lagi? Backup power (inverter/generator) rakhe hune tha.
erp_action: Create Spoilage Loss Entry: Debit Spoilage Loss A/c (10L x cost), Credit Milk Inventory A/c. Document cause: power cut. Check insurance claim eligibility.

user_input: duplicate stock entry parisakyo, cancel garnu parcha
normalized_meaning: Duplicate stock entry was made, need to cancel it
tax_effect: Reversal entry — no new tax effect
clarification_question: Kun entry duplicate bhayo? Entry number/date ke tha? Amount kati tha? Reversal entry garnu parcha same amount opposite side ma.
erp_action: Identify duplicate entry by reference number. Create Reversal Entry (equal and opposite) or use ERP void/cancel function to nullify duplicate. Verify inventory balance after correction.

user_input: aaj pikaas festival, demand badhyo, stock sakkiyo bich din ma
normalized_meaning: Today is festival (likely Pika/Teej/Dashain), demand surged, stock ran out mid-day
tax_effect: None
erp_action: Log stock-out event. Record: sold-out time, estimated lost sales. For next festival: set reorder level higher. Consider pre-ordering before festivals (Dashain, Tihar, Teej, etc.).

user_input: milk supplier badlyo naya aaayo, contract garnu parcha
normalized_meaning: Changed milk supplier, new one arrived, need to create a contract/agreement
tax_effect: None yet
clarification_question: Naya supplier ko naam, address, PAN number, rate per litre, delivery days/time ke cha? Yee sabai information ERP ma add garna parcha.
erp_action: Create New Supplier Profile in ERP: Name, Address, PAN, Bank Details, Payment Terms, Product, Rate, Delivery Schedule. No accounting entry yet — first transaction will generate entries.

user_input: milk 2 litre ko Rs 130 aayo customer bata, Khalti
normalized_meaning: Received Rs 130 from customer for 2 litres of milk via Khalti
tax_effect: Fresh milk VAT exempt. Verify.
erp_action: Create Sale Entry: Debit Khalti A/c NPR 130, Credit Sales-Milk NPR 130. Update inventory -2L.

user_input: sabai accounts bata report nikaal, kaha paisa cha, kaha nai cha, full picture
normalized_meaning: Generate full financial picture — all accounts report, where money is and isn't
tax_effect: None
erp_action: Generate: (1) Balance Sheet — Assets (Cash, Bank, eSewa, Khalti, Inventory, Debtors, Advances), Liabilities (Creditors, Loans), Equity. (2) P&L Statement. (3) Cash Flow Summary. (4) Debtor Aging. (5) Creditor Aging. Display as dashboard.

user_input: ghee ko stock aaj nai sakkiyo, reorder garnu parcha
normalized_meaning: Ghee stock finished today, need to reorder
tax_effect: None
clarification_question: Kati quantity order garnu parcha? Supplier ko naam ke cha? Kailhe chahiyo — aaj ki bholi?
erp_action: Trigger Reorder Alert for Ghee. Create Purchase Order draft. Notify owner for approval. Contact supplier immediately.

user_input: Nisha le Rs 300 diye, dahi ko khata clearance
normalized_meaning: Nisha paid Rs 300, clearing her dahi credit account
tax_effect: None
clarification_question: Nisha le cash diye ki eSewa/Khalti? Full clearance ho ki partial?
erp_action: Create Collection Entry: Debit Cash/eSewa A/c NPR 300, Credit Nisha Debtor A/c NPR 300. Clear/reduce Nisha's khata balance.

user_input: sabai staff ko Dashain bonus dinu parcha, kul 15000
normalized_meaning: Need to give Dashain bonus to all staff, total Rs 15,000
tax_effect: Bonus part of salary — TDS applicable if total annual income of employee exceeds exemption limit. Dashain bonus = 1 month salary typically under Nepal Labour Act. Consult CA.
clarification_question: Payment mode ke cha? Staff ko individual naam ra amounts? TDS deduct garnu parcha ki chaina — CA sanga confirm garnus.
erp_action: Create Bonus Expense Entry: Debit Bonus Expense NPR 15,000, Credit Cash/Bank NPR 15,000 (after TDS consideration). Issue payslips to staff.

user_input: Puja Dairy le debit note pathaayo, 200 Rs ko
normalized_meaning: Puja Dairy sent a debit note for Rs 200
credit_accounts: Purchase Returns / Adjustment A/c or increase in purchase cost
inventory_effect: Depends on reason — may indicate additional charge on purchase
tax_effect: If debit note related to VAT, adjust VAT accordingly.
clarification_question: Debit note kina aayo — quality issue, price revision, ki extra delivery charge? Reason bujhe pachhi correct entry garnu parcha.
erp_action: After clarification: Create corresponding entry. If additional charge: Debit Purchase/Expense A/c NPR 200, Credit Puja Dairy Payable NPR 200.

user_input: shop ko naam ma current account kholna chahanchhu
normalized_meaning: Want to open a current account in the shop's name
tax_effect: None on account opening itself. Bank may require PAN certificate.
erp_action: Advisory: Contact any commercial bank in Nepal (Nabil, NIC Asia, NMB, Laxmi, etc.) with PAN certificate, citizenship, registration documents, passport photo. Opening a current account is recommended for business to separate personal and business finances. Once opened, add to ERP Bank Account setup.

user_input: aaako nai chha, tyo 2 din bata aako payment, Rs 800 esewa
normalized_meaning: Pending payment from 2 days ago now arrived, Rs 800 via eSewa
tax_effect: None
clarification_question: Customer ko naam ke ho? Kun transaction ko payment aaayo (2 din aghi ko)? eSewa ref note gare?
erp_action: Create Collection Entry: Debit eSewa A/c NPR 800, Credit Customer Receivable NPR 800. Match against 2-day-old invoice. Record eSewa transaction reference.

user_input: sabai creditors lai paisa dinu parcha, total kati cha outstanding?
normalized_meaning: Need to pay all creditors, asking for total outstanding payable
tax_effect: None
erp_action: Generate Accounts Payable Summary: List all creditors with outstanding balances and due dates. Sort by due date (most urgent first). Total payable amount displayed.

user_input: mero dahi vs market rate compare garna sakchhu?
normalized_meaning: Can I compare my dahi prices with market rates?
tax_effect: None
erp_action: Display your current dahi selling price from Item Master. Note: ERP does not have live market price data. For market comparison, check local sabji bazar, competitors, or Nepal Dairy Association price bulletins manually.

user_input: delivery boy lai ek hapta ko 1500 diye cycle petrol kharcha
normalized_meaning: Paid delivery boy Rs 1500 for one week's cycle/petrol expenses
tax_effect: If regular salary component: payroll entry. If reimbursement: expense entry.
clarification_question: Yei salary ho ki petrol/cycle reimbursement ho? Delivery boy ko naam ke ho?
erp_action: Create Expense Entry: Debit Transport/Delivery Expense NPR 1500, Credit Cash NPR 1500.

user_input: customer le dahi maagyo tara stock nai chaina, apologise garyo
normalized_meaning: Customer asked for dahi but it was out of stock, had to apologise
tax_effect: None
erp_action: Log lost sale due to stock-out. Update reorder alert for dahi. For ERP analytics: record as 'lost demand' to improve future forecasting.

user_input: paneer 3 kg bechyo, 260/kg, cash 2 kg, credit 1 kg - Sunita ko khata
normalized_meaning: Sold 3 kg paneer at Rs 260/kg: 2 kg cash, 1 kg on credit to Sunita
tax_effect: Paneer VAT to verify.

user_input: sab thiggayo, hisab milyo, koi issue chaina aaj

user_input: supplier ko mobile number change gareko raicha, update garna parcha
normalized_meaning: Supplier's mobile number has changed, need to update in records
tax_effect: None
clarification_question: Supplier ko naam ke ho? Naya number ke ho?
erp_action: Update Supplier Master: Change mobile number to new number. No accounting entry needed.

user_input: yogurt vs dahi — ek nai ho?
normalized_meaning: Is yogurt and dahi the same product for accounting?

user_input: Sujal milk 500 ml 30 ta aayo, expire date 3 din ma cha, jaldi bechnu parcha
normalized_meaning: Received 30 pcs of Sujal 500ml milk, expiry in 3 days, need to sell quickly
inventory_effect: 30 pcs near-expiry stock requiring urgent sale

user_input: thulo customer aayo, Rs 15000 ko bulk order dahi ko, 3 din ma delivery dinu parcha
normalized_meaning: Large customer placed bulk order for dahi worth Rs 15,000, delivery required in 3 days
inventory_effect: Need to arrange stock for 3-day delivery
tax_effect: VAT if applicable at delivery/invoice time.
clarification_question: Customer ko naam ke ho? Kati kg dahi? Advance lene ho ki delivery pachi paisa? Supplier bata stock available cha?
erp_action: Create Sales Order (not invoice yet): Record order details. Check stock availability. Place purchase order with supplier if needed. Invoice at delivery.

user_input: phone ma baat garo aaj customer sanga, order confirm garyo, paisa aayena
normalized_meaning: Talked with customer over phone today, order confirmed, no payment received yet
tax_effect: None yet
clarification_question: Customer ko naam ke ho? K k order garyo? Kati ma bechneko? Kailhe delivery?
erp_action: Create Sales Order after details collected. No journal entry until delivery and invoice. Phone record = verbal order only.

user_input: Pashupati Dairy bata brand ghee kinyo, 48 packs 500gm, 340 per pack, invoice aaayo VAT sita
normalized_meaning: Purchased branded ghee from Pashupati Dairy, 48 packs of 500gm at Rs 340/pack, received VAT invoice
debit_accounts: Input VAT Receivable (13% of taxable amount or as per invoice)
credit_accounts: Cash or Pashupati Dairy Payable (total including VAT)
tax_effect: VAT invoice received: Input VAT credit claimable IF shop is VAT registered. If shop not VAT registered, VAT is additional cost to include in purchase price. Consult CA. Do not assume shop is VAT registered.
amount: NPR 16,320 (48 x 340) plus VAT amount per invoice
clarification_question: Shop VAT registered cha? Invoice ma VAT amount kati cha? Payment mode ke ho? Invoice number ke cha?
erp_action: If VAT registered: Debit Purchase-Ghee (base) + Debit Input VAT, Credit Pashupati Dairy Payable (incl. VAT). If NOT VAT registered: Debit Purchase-Ghee (total incl. VAT as cost), Credit Payable. Update inventory +48 pcs ghee.

user_input: aaj hami Rs 500 ko ghee khayo ghar ma, shop bata nikalyam
normalized_meaning: Today we consumed Rs 500 worth of ghee from shop stock for household use
transaction_category: Goods Taken for Personal Use (Drawings in Kind)
debit_accounts: Owner's Drawings Account (at cost or selling price per policy)
inventory_effect: Decrease: Ghee stock -500 Rs worth (at cost)
tax_effect: Goods withdrawn for personal use treated as drawings. Not a business expense. If VAT shop: deemed supply rules may apply. Consult CA.
erp_action: Create Drawings in Kind Entry: Debit Owner's Drawings NPR 500, Credit Inventory-Ghee NPR 500 (at cost). Reduce ghee stock accordingly.

user_input: Rs 50 commission diye delivery app lai per order
normalized_meaning: Paying Rs 50 commission per order to delivery app
tax_effect: Commission to digital platform: TDS may apply. Verify if platform issues invoice. Consult CA.
amount: NPR 50 per order (total depends on order count)
clarification_question: Kun delivery app? Monthly total kati order bhayo? Commission invoice aaucha ki invoice-less deduction cha settlement bata?
erp_action: Record commission expense. Debit Commission Expense, Credit Settlement Account. If TDS applicable: deduct and remit to IRD.

user_input: fiscal year sakkiyo, next year suru garnu cha
normalized_meaning: Fiscal year ended (Nepali fiscal year ends Ashad end), starting new year
inventory_effect: Closing stock of old year = Opening stock of new year
tax_effect: File annual income tax return, VAT return (if registered), TDS return. Closing entries for P&L accounts to Retained Earnings. Consult CA before closing.
erp_action: Fiscal Year Close Process: (1) Run closing stock valuation, (2) Post closing journal entries (P&L to Retained Earnings), (3) Generate final Balance Sheet and P&L, (4) Create new FY in ERP, (5) Carry forward opening balances (assets, liabilities, equity, debtors, creditors, stock), (6) Tax returns filing — consult CA.

user_input: mero saathi le paisa udhaaro liyako cha shop bata, 1000 rupees, personal ho
normalized_meaning: Friend borrowed Rs 1000 from shop, it's a personal matter
debit_accounts: Loan to Friend / Other Receivable (or Owner's Drawings if treated as owner's personal matter)
tax_effect: Mixing personal and business: not ideal. If treated as owner's drawing then personal. If business loan: record separately.
clarification_question: Business ko naam ma loan diye ho ki owner ko personal nam ma? Kailhe firtaa garaune? Yei business practice ma nai rakhne ho ki owner ko personal account bata dinu tha?
erp_action: Option A: Treat as Owner Drawing: Debit Drawings NPR 1000, Credit Cash NPR 1000. Option B: Treat as Other Receivable: Debit Loan to Friends NPR 1000, Credit Cash NPR 1000. Clarify with owner.

user_input: sold 200ml milk pouch 50 pcs, Rs 25 each, cash, morning shift
normalized_meaning: Sold 50 pcs of 200ml milk pouch at Rs 25 each during morning shift, cash payment
tax_effect: Packaged milk VAT status to verify.
erp_action: Create Sale Entry: Debit Cash NPR 1250, Credit Sales-Packaged Milk NPR 1250. Update inventory -50 pcs 200ml milk pouches.

user_input: hamro shop ko top 3 items k k cha?
normalized_meaning: What are our shop's top 3 selling items?
tax_effect: None
erp_action: Generate Item-wise Sales Report sorted by revenue/quantity. Display top 3 products by sales value for selected period (default: current month or last 30 days).

user_input: stationery kinyo: register book, pen, calculator — 550 rupees total
normalized_meaning: Purchased stationery (register book, pen, calculator) for Rs 550
tax_effect: Minor expense. No significant tax effect.
erp_action: Create Expense Entry: Debit Stationery/Office Expense NPR 550, Credit Cash NPR 550.

user_input: today collected from eSewa 2300, Khalti 700, FonePay 500 — settle to bank
normalized_meaning: Settle digital wallet collections (eSewa Rs 2300, Khalti Rs 700, FonePay Rs 500) to bank account
tax_effect: None on internal transfer. Ensure original sales entries already recorded.
erp_action: Create Settlement Entry: Debit Bank NPR 3500, Credit eSewa NPR 2300 + Credit Khalti NPR 700 + Credit FonePay NPR 500. Reconcile each wallet statement.

user_input: opening stock cha aaj: milk 20L, dahi 5kg, ghee 2kg, paneer 1kg
normalized_meaning: Opening stock for today: milk 20L, dahi 5kg, ghee 2kg, paneer 1kg
inventory_effect: Opening stock established: Milk 20L, Dahi 5kg, Ghee 2kg, Paneer 1kg
tax_effect: None on stock recording.
amount: to be valued at cost (not given)
clarification_question: Cost price per unit of each item ke cha? Tyo cost bata opening stock value calculate huncha.
erp_action: Update Opening Stock in ERP: Milk 20L, Dahi 5kg, Ghee 2kg, Paneer 1kg. Assign cost prices per item. This becomes the starting point for today's stock movements.

user_input: I accidentally double counted ghee yesterday
normalized_meaning: Accidentally entered ghee stock count twice yesterday — inventory error
inventory_effect: Reduce ghee stock by overcounted amount
tax_effect: None on correction
clarification_question: Kati quantity double count bhaako tha? Correct amount kati hunu parchha? Yesterday ko entry number ke tha?
erp_action: Identify yesterday's duplicate ghee entry. Create reverse/correction entry for overcounted quantity. Debit Stock Adjustment, Credit Ghee Inventory (for overcounted qty). Verify final balance matches physical stock.

user_input: sabai cheez ठीक cha, aaja koi tension chaina
normalized_meaning: Everything is fine today, no accounting issues to report
tax_effect: None
erp_action: No action required. Log status: Business operations normal. No pending entries flagged.

user_input: 2 litre buffalo milk, customer ramesh le liyyo, Khalti pathaaidinchhu bhanyo, abhai aayena
normalized_meaning: Ramesh took 2 litres buffalo milk, said he would send payment via Khalti, payment not received yet
tax_effect: Verify VAT.
clarification_question: Per litre rate kati cha? Khalti aayo bhaneko notification aayeko cha? Confirm nahunasamma receivable ma rakhnus.
erp_action: Create provisional Sale Entry: Debit Ramesh Receivable, Credit Sales-Buffalo Milk. When Khalti payment confirmed: Debit Khalti A/c, Credit Ramesh Receivable.

user_input: dahi ko rate check garnu parcha, market bata mahango bechneko chhu ki sasto?
normalized_meaning: Need to check dahi rate — am I selling higher or lower than market?
tax_effect: None
erp_action: Display your current dahi selling price. Note: Real-time market price comparison requires external market data. Suggest visiting competitors or checking Nepal Dairy Association bulletins for market rate reference.

user_input: customer le aaj paisa din aaucha bhaneko tha, aayena phone garnu parcha
normalized_meaning: Customer had promised to pay today but didn't come, need to call them
tax_effect: None
clarification_question: Customer ko naam ke ho? Kati amount outstanding cha? Phone number cha?
erp_action: Identify customer from AR ledger. Generate follow-up reminder. Display outstanding balance and original promise date. Log follow-up attempt in customer notes.

user_input: tea shop lai daily 3 litre dahi dinchhau, haftama ek palta bill garinchhau
normalized_meaning: Supplying 3 litres dahi daily to tea shop, billing them weekly
tax_effect: B2B sale. Weekly invoice. VAT if applicable.
amount: 3 x 7 x rate = weekly invoice amount
clarification_question: Tea shop ko naam ke ho? Rate kati cha per litre? eSewa/cash ma tircha? PAN number cha?
erp_action: Setup recurring weekly sale. Create Tea Shop ledger. Record 3L daily dahi delivery. Every 7 days: generate weekly invoice. On payment: record collection.
